ksa_text: Ability to apply consistent governance standards across heterogeneous AI systems — from simple rule-based automation to large language models — without treating all systems identically.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to apply programming language structures (e.g., source code review) and logic.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ability to apply programming language structures (e.g., source code review) and logic.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-A-003 (AI, Ability) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4395 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.439, nist_ai_rmf=0.423, onet=0.392) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4395 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-A-003 (composite 0.4395) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4395 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Bioinformatics Technician at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4395 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4395, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
